title: Artanthe martiana
taxonomy: Artanthe martiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Artanthe and is native to New Caledonia. Artanthe martiana is a type of evergreen tree or shrub that grows in tropical regions. The classification of Artanthe martiana is further supported by its characteristics, such as its simple leaves and small, white flowers. Artanthe martiana is a relatively rare species, which makes it an interesting subject for botanical studies.
